summary: Complete testing of 2 project management enhancements: 1) Due date cascade when project due_date is updated, 2) Auto-computed project status based on task completion. All backend tests passed (8/8). All frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Due Date Cascade): PUT /api/projects/{id} with {due_date: 'new_date'} correctly updates all tasks under that project via db.tasks.update_many() in routes/projects.py lines 631-636.

Feature 2 (Auto-computed Status): GET /api/projects and GET /api/projects/{id} auto-compute status based on task completion. Logic: if stored_status != 'on_hold', then if all tasks completed -> 'completed', else -> 'pending'. Projects with 0 tasks show as 'pending'.
Frontend statusConfig includes 'pending' with yellow styling (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700) and Clock icon from lucide-react.
Status filter dropdown has 'Pending' option (value='pending', text='Pending').
seed_data_creation: Test projects created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two project management enhancements fully tested and working: 1) Due date cascade - when project due_date is updated via PUT /api/projects/{id}, all tasks under that project get the new due_date. 2) Auto-computed project status - projects show 'pending' when not all tasks completed, 'completed' when all tasks completed, 'on_hold' stays as on_hold. Frontend statusConfig includes 'pending' with yellow styling and Clock icon. Status filter dropdown has 'Pending' option.

feature_1_due_date_cascade.description: When project due_date is changed via PUT /api/projects/{id}, all tasks under that project automatically get the new due_date

feature_2_auto_computed_status.description: Project status auto-computes as 'completed' when all tasks completed, 'pending' when not all completed. On hold projects stay as on_hold.

frontend_tests: Status filter dropdown has 'Pending' option - PASSED
statusConfig includes 'pending' with yellow styling (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700) - PASSED
Pending status badge has Clock icon (lucide-react) - PASSED
feature_3_frontend_pending_status.description: Frontend Projects page status filter dropdown includes 'Pending' option with correct styling
